title: rhynchostemon glutinosus
intro: Rhynchostemon glutinosus is a plant species commonly known as the Sticky Rhus or China Glutinosum, belonging to the family Rhamnaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which make it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rhynchostemon glutinosum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, with some traditional practices also utilizing it in poultices and topical applications.
